title: Angry Creepers
description: Creepers... but ANGRY! Makes creepers... well, angry!
body:
Ever wanted creepers to have a bit more emotion? Maybe you wanted to see why they explode all the time?

Well then Angry Creepers is the pack for you!

This simple pack changes the creepers facial expression from neutral, to angry!

NOTE: if you see an incompatible pack error, just ignore it. This pack is made for versions 1.21.8 and up.
